violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Shrimp skewers being thawed in standing water at 3 tub sink in meat dept.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Upright reach in coolers in meat dept. have torn/damaged gaskets.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in prep table cooler has pooling water and needs cleaning. Drawer cooler has debris in bottom and needs cleaning. Walk in cooler shelving & storage racks have food debris build up and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Line cooking and refrigeration equipment have a build up of food/grease debris and are in need of cleaning. Lower shelving under prep counter need cleaning. Cabinet doors in conference room have food splatter and need cleaning.

Backflow prevention. — --Direct connection existed between the sewage system and drain originating from equipment in which food, portable equipment/utensils are placed. Meat dept. using 3rd sink in 3 tub system as food prep sink. Sink system has direct connection to sewage lines.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling tiles in meat dept. have peeling veneer and need repair/replacement.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Box of pizza crusts placed on floor in conference prep area. Store of floor.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Multiple food items in upper portion of prep table cooler in conference prep station not maintained at proper temperatures. Place food containers in a manner that allows proper temperatures to be maintained.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Storage shelving in walk in cooler and prep line, line cooking equipment counters and racks, & reach in units need cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Chemical line at 3 compartment sink in dish area not connected. Dispenser not able to maintain proper chemical sanitizing concentrations.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of food service containers stored on floor in conference room prep area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Unfinished wall construction in new prep area. Unsealed sheetrock and hole in wall at utility faucet.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under equipment and shelving units have an accumulation of food, grease, and debris. Needs cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
